turns.assistant_text: Tôi là một router nghiên cứu, có khả năng xử lý các yêu cầu liên quan đến nghiên cứu, tin tức, đọc bài viết trên web, nghiên cứu trên mạng xã hội/Twitter, định dạng các mục nghiên cứu hiện có, tìm kiếm chính sách nội bộ, tìm kiếm bài báo học thuật, trích xuất văn bản từ bài báo, và gửi/công bố thông tin đã xác nhận. Nếu bạn có yêu cầu nào trong các lĩnh vực này, hãy cho tôi biết!

turns.user: lấy thông tin báo twitter mới
turns.assistant_text: Bạn muốn tìm thông tin từ tài khoản Twitter nào?

args.question: Bạn muốn tìm thông tin từ tài khoản Twitter nào?

result.question: Bạn muốn tìm thông tin từ tài khoản Twitter nào?

turns.assistant_text:
Here are the latest tweets from @FortyGuard:

1. **[We're Hiring Interns at FortyGuard](https://x.com/FortyGuard/status/2061491515109646401)**  
   We're Hiring Interns at FortyGuard  
   Internship positions:  
   - Data Engineer Intern  
   - Machine Learning Intern  
   - Software Engineer Intern  
   - Product Intern  
   Applications close in 2 days. Interested? Send your CV to hr@fortyguard.com with the position you're applying for in the subject line.  
   *Date: Mon Jun 01 2026*  
   *Favorites: 206, Retweets: 10, Views: 14,133*

2. **[FortyGuard Wishes you Eid Mubarak!](https://x.com/FortyGuard/status/2059303147600785712)**  
   FortyGuard Wishes you Eid Mubarak!  
   *Date: Tue May 26 2026*  
   *Favorites: 0, Retweets: 0, Views: 457*

3. **[At @ADSWagenda, we hosted H.E. Osama Amir Fadhel](https://x.com/FortyGuard/status/2016534230260678869)**  
   At @ADSWagenda, we hosted H.E. Osama Amir Fadhel, accompanied by Abdelaziz Harib and Butti Almheiri, at our booth! Their visit is a strong signal of how data, AI, and climate intelligence are becoming part of the UAE’s wider innovation and industrial agenda. #ADSW2026  
   *Date: Wed Jan 28 2026*  
   *Favorites: 0, Retweets: 0, Views: 245*

4. **[During Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week 2026](https://x.com/FortyGuard/status/2014366267516285370)**  
   During Abu Dhabi Sustainability Week 2026, we were honoured to welcome H.H. Sheikha Shamma bint Sultan Al Nahyan to the FortyGuard booth. Her Highness shared how FortyGuard’s temperature intelligence can complement the UAE's mission to make the country greener. #ADSW2026  
   *Date: Thu Jan 22 2026*  
   *Favorites: 0, Retweets: 0, Views: 158*

5. **[Proud to be bringing hyperlocal temperature intelligence](https://x.com/FortyGuard/status/2013966496939032779)**  
   Proud to be bringing hyperlocal temperature intelligence to @adswagenda for the 4th year in a row! #ADSW is all about accelerating climate solutions, and we’re grateful to be part of that mission by turning urban heat data into actionable climate-ready city planning.  
   *Date: Wed Jan 21 2026*  
   *Favorites: 3, Retweets: 1, Views: 125*
